Andreas Anagnostou

And then & the End

© Andreas Anagnostou 2026. All rights reserved.

A tribute to an amazing young lady —

Stella. 💫

*Young meaning anywhere between the ages of 9 and 99.

Content 📜

Almost
made it in time.

👏👏👏👏👏👏👏👏


...on
yet another...

For
honestly?

That

is
already...

something worth

Almost
a prologue.

...back on...

our
second date...

...you
basically...

"hype-manned" me...

...into
showing you...

...a
part of...

If
my memory...

does not

what
you said...

was something like:

To which —

I think it's safe to say:

I
assume...

you've heard the saying that goes:

Allow
me then —

to ask you something in return:

If
you do —

Almost
time to step inside.

What
comes next —

might be a little

Either
way —

this is my world.

And this?

inviting you in.

I

Ahem — I may not...

...always...

be able to

If...

only you'd...

Had...

you done that —

For honestly —

that's the

I cannot

Ahem — I mean...

...thank you for

Pun intended —
💡Hint: The actor's nickname.

Got that?

His name is Dwayne Johnson —

Now —

before you start the

or
facepalming...

yourself... 🤦‍♀️

fair
warning —

my jokes might make you go like:

In fact —

it's possible you say:

To which —

I might say things such as:

By
the way —

whether I make them — is not...

That
said —

you'll just have to...

Almost
too sincere.

Seriously though —

...just

...in
your presence...

...or
in your arms...

...or to

face.

Maybe...

steal a

Or
even...

have you tease me...

...and
then...

Would
I like it? —

If
only you'd

What
would've changed? —

you may ask.

Nothing —

or anything really.

Honestly?

I cannot answer that.

Whether
you choose...

to believe it —

or not —

Anyhow —

brace yourself —

for

Almost
good news.

on
which day...

they
looked...

as if they

And
all that —

took place around a

💡 Hint:

It's someone who —

And
by world —

I mean

You

Almost
the beginning.

Out
of all the days

this one matters the most.

For
today —

is your

And
you deserve

less than

All
jokes aside —

😝 Fun fact: 🤓

In the movie Hercules says this very thing to Meg.
Except he adds: weak ankles — which I've cut it.
Unironically — I was planning to replace it with weak lower back.
But clearly I haven't — for I felt proud of that cut.

For the

I'd
be telling...

you this — every single day.

times per day even — if I had to.

Or until

Moving on...

I
might...

just have an idea — 💡

of
what makes...

in a good story. 📓

since...

we both know that.

decided

...one.

will

from

a

between —

by the...

if I...

were to

to this — it'd probably be something like:

To which —

my answer would've been:

Almost
«half-time»

In case
you haven't already —

find yourself a
comfortable place to sit —

maybe even

yourself a drink? 🍹

With
that —

Almost
time.

there was a girl.

nor
does she...

But...

She
has this...

kind of presence —

that
makes...

everything else — fade away.

She
is hands down —

the most

And
she just...

happened to have...

a...
soft spot...

for a...

...very
specific type...

of a fox —

Which —

brings us to him.

For
somewhere...

not that far away —

there
was a boy —

who eventually turned out
to be a fine young man.

He
was a...

charming —

confident —

and
ridiculously

Not
to mention...

shy.

But beyond those
traits of his...

he had some
less obvious

He had a... 🕊️

kind soul.

A heart of... 💛

gold.

Warm eyes that...
put people at ease. 😇

And the kind of
smile...
you cannot really forget.

Unironically...
he had already swept her off her...

Without
even...

realizing it. 😇

For...

She'd been...
captivated by...

And she
was...
very fond of men whose...

Not to
mention...
his movement had such...

...and
such...

She'd been...
overwhelmed by how much...

Or by
how...
he enjoyed...

And...
the way he tapped his...

It had...
certain qualities to it.

And the
precision?

For he was
inspired by...
none other than
the legendary...

Last but
not least...
his dance moves were...

Interesting fact:
he plays the...

With such

that surprises most people.

Those
were...
all the things that...

Unironically... 🔍

he got her curious.

Curious enough
at least...
to take off her...

So she looked
for...
a way for them to connect — with her innate...

And after...

Or more accurately,
she'd tracked his Instagram...

and then she simply hit:

Which raises the question:
How exactly did that happen?

That remains —
even to this day
one of life's greatest...

But what matters...

Eventually... 👀
she drew his attention.

His first message?
Yeah — not his...

In fact...
it did not go well —
for it got her...

Safe to assume...
her mind went
something like:

However...
here's the thing.

...was not charmed by her.

And the idea...
that someone as...

...could even consider him?
That alone was...
enough to throw him
completely...

For she was not...
just pretty — she was...

In a way
he...

He then
noticed something... 👀
She was a dancer like him.

His immediate impression?
Yeah — a real...

Her being
a Queen and all... 👑
got him thinking:

It was in that moment...
it'd become loud and clear
to him.

Back then
however...

For as...

He was not ready for such a thing.

For his
life...
had first
to be turned...

All jokes aside...
his whole world had to be turned...

If only there
was someone who...
could sprinkle
a little luck their way.

For only
by some...

would they...

But little did they
know...
how destiny still held up its sleeve a couple...

And as for their story?

Several years
went by... ⏳

and in the meantime?

Life was not
exactly fair...
to either of them.

For it
did not... ⚖️

treat them the way they deserved.

They had
to go through... ⚖️

some life-changing...

...even
heartbreaking...
experiences neither
would wish on anyone.

One of them... 😢

might've had it worse
than the other.

Nonetheless...
both came out
stronger.

There might've been
times... ⏳

they hoped for
something to rub on...

...and magically...
make all their pain
disappear. 😞

Perhaps
they wished...
they hadn't cried
as much. 😭

Or maybe
even...
they'd have cried
more. 😢

Still...

they'd been taught...

...some not
so pretty but... 🌱

valuable lessons
in the process.

Such as
the world is not... 🌍

a place all sunshine
and rainbows.

In times of
despair...
they might've thought:
It can't get any worse, can it?

Then they'd
remind themselves...

they would not be
who they are today.

Had they
not... 🔥

risen above it all.

Or had they not
reinvented themselves... 🌱

in every humanly
possible way.

Much like a
phoenix —
rising from
its own ashes.

which
at first glance...

...seemed
quite...

The
girl was... 📖

possibly studying somewhere.

Or literally
anywhere else... 🚶

minding
her own business.

While
the boy...
was most likely...

Doing what he
thought was best for him...
to navigate through the...

Unexpectedly...
he started
having this...

For
lately... 📖

she'd been watching his every story.

She'd been...

browsing his Instagram.

Quite possibly...
out of...

And then the most...

His brain 🧠
nudged him about texting her.

He'd happily
lost this round.
For the winning
argument was:

He liked to...
imagine what her...
reaction upon reading
his message was. Perhaps something like...

Although...
if he were being honest —
her face was closer to...

He knew
better....
but honestly?


she actually wrote back.

And positively at that.

Which could
only mean...

She was simply curious as to
why now.

Or she had...

better to do.

Without
even realizing it...
her direct and
open response had...

For he'd overcome
any and... 💪

all of his past rejections —
instantly!

And just like that —
he was beaming with

Wanting to...

For his
leap of faith...

had served him well this time.

It was not
that long ago he...

right back into...

...the
dating world.
Which raises the question:

On the
day of their date... 🌙

he went to the barbershop...

...and... 💈

got himself a haircut.

For he did
not want...
to look like a...

Around
lunchtime...
he decided
to give her a...

What
they...
talked about...

That's
not true — for

To which
her reaction was:

saying:

Which was
music to his ears.
For his inner child went like:

What mattered
was... 📞

that they'd actually
spoken on the phone.

Or the...

that he felt after
checking his box:

A couple hours
before seeing her... 🛁

he decided to take a bath.

He started...

about what outfit
he was going to wear.

So there
he was...
wearing...

That's when he
realized...
he had to hurry up —
or else...

For he
did not... ⏳

want her
waiting on him.

And after...

with himself
for a while...

...he'd
finally...

made up his
mind.

He was
not going to... 🧠

let his overthinking
get the best of him.

For that
would...

not get him
anywhere.

As soon as he got ready... 👀

he looked at himself in the

...and thought out loud:
You got this, buddy! 💪

For who is there as beautiful as me?
Why — only she!

Then...

...while his excitement
was... 📈

off the charts.

the whole way.

While waiting for the metro... 🚇

he liked to fantasize what...

...her getting ready... 👀

looked like.

Whether
she...

panicked like he had.

Whether she'd... ⚠️

run into any trouble...

...or
whether... ⚠️

trouble would run into her.

...or
whether...

everything was fine.

What he did not know was that he... 🌍

was about to be blown out
of his world.

For she had
worn... 🧠

her dark top
alongside her dark-leather skirt.

😝 Fun fact: 🤓

She looked

less than

Especially...

...and
that...

Not to
mention...

like a total badass.

And she
was...

very well aware of that.

On his...

ride with the metro...

He kept...
turning over the same question: 🤔

Part of him imagined...

how it'd be fun —
at least on his end...

lift her up in the air.

Inspired
by...
none other than the iconic...

It was
something

he'd always wanted to do.

Especially since... 💃

both of them were dancers.

Which could
go...

Needless to say... ⚠️

he did not do such thing —
for it would've been way too inappropriate.

And let's not forget...

he already had a history of
pissing her off.

Be that as it
may...
he did not want to...

At least not... ⏳

this early on — or ever really.

As he got off the...

he spotted her in the crowd.

So
naturally...
he started walking towards her
thinking: 🚶‍♂️‍➡️💭

He was not sure at first whether it was...

actually her — but secretly
he hoped it was. 😶

For she had
that... 💪

unmistakable air of confidence.

The very
thing...
that drew his...

At least
in the

Not to
mention...
how one had to be...

...that
absolutely... 💈

stunning red hair of hers.

The moment had finally come...
where their eyes met.

For at
least...
ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ❥ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ❥ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ❥ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ

😝 Fun fact: 🤓

He recognized her by her boots.

And they
had...

that same shade as Jafar's robe.

It must've been something past ten... 🌙

and all the bars were packed.

Eventually... ⏳

they sat themselves at a table.

And there
he was...

sitting right next to her.

Unable to...

take his eyes off her. 👀

He then thought
to himself: 🧠

This shouldn't be too hard.

For he
was...

For he
was... 💪

taking care of his body...

...never... 💪

skipping a workout.

He'd also... 💪

adopted healthier
eating habits.

And he'd always... 🛏️

made sure to get
enough hours of sleep.

Usually...
these three things alone... 💪

helped grow his confidence.

Well...
it wasn't exactly a...

For he had
to...

...while
dealing...

with the pressure of...

...knowing
how... ⚠️

any wrong word...

...could easily...

at any given moment. ⚖️

Some might look at this and say: 🍋

Piece of cake.

Others even might say: 🍋

Easy peasy lemon squeezy.

But to him?
It felt more like balancing...
⚖️

one too many things
all at once.

Almost like
in the film:

Everything Everywhere All at Once.

For this was
his first... 🌙

real date in a while.

However —
any attempt he made to 🧱

impress her —
felt like hitting a wall.

As...

as that might've been...

...of getting to know her better.
So he had to keep his...

...and
stay...
true to his...

Admittedly...
he got rather...

But as...

as that might've been...

...he managed
to...

It took him sheer...

Eventually...
he did manage to
make her...

Her face... 🔥

turned all red.

Her eyes? 📖

They were darting left and right.

And it was in...

moment...

he'd realized...

...his heart was...

ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ❥ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ❥ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ❥ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ

For in that moment... 💎

he decided...

...that

in the entirety of
Disney's world...

...mattered...

more to him than...

...seeing her face light up... 💎

like that again.

As they
talked...

she mentioned she danced heels. 👠

He already knew
that...

but so what? — he was still absolutely fascinated. 🤪

She mentioned she loved drawing... 🎨

mostly abstract things.

Or that she'd been...
in a musical theatre group...

Meanwhile... 📚

he was thinking:
What a talented young lady.

He was
wondering...

What other talents has she not mentioned yet? 😏

Every so
often... 💈

she nervously tucked her hair behind her ear...

...making it increasingly difficult...

Which brought up the question:

Or kiss you now? 😗

To which her answer stunned him.

Kissing was not...
something she'd normally do on a first date.

When she'd feel
ready enough...

he'd then make his
move again.

So he
respectfully decided to...

he thought to himself:
At least we had a nice flow.

While on
her side...
a thought or two
might've crossed her mind:

As the new week
began... ⏳

they went out for a second time.

He went over
the... 🏠

place where she was working.

He'd brought her...
a little...

...which he not...

effortlessly resisted eating it.

For he
knew...
what a...

Anyway...

it was becoming clear to him...

...he was...

From what an active listener
she'd proven out to be.

She was starting
to...

seem genuinely
more interested in him.

For she
had...
even started...

Even encouraging him... 🌍

to let her into his world.

To which — his

For to him — this was
clearly the greenest flag.

Suddenly... 💃

he stretched his hand out
and asked her for a dance.

She was hesitant —
for she was not
feeling comfortable
enough — convinced that...

So he respected that
and... 🫂

reached for a hug instead.

As her hands touched
the... 🫂

back of his neck —
he got goosebumps all over.

So he
then... 🫂

held her tight in his arms...

...appreciating... 💎

every second of that moment.

It was getting...

So they had to go.

They were
the...
last ones to...

As they reached
her place... 🚶

he said:

It's still too early
to call it a night.

Why don't you show me
around your neighbourhood?

To which
her eyes lit up immediately.

"Are you asking
to go for a walk?"
— she said before he'd
even finished asking.

During the walk she confided in him... 🚶

Her biggest fear? 😢

She was galeophobic.

And
people...

were making fun of that.

She'd also mentioned her habit...

of speaking or eating slowly

Which
her... 👯

own sisters criticized.

As they
wandered... 🚶

they ended up at a park nearby.

...which had
a bench. 📞

And it practically called out to them.

He insisted she sit on his lap...

...she was pulling away every time
he'd reach for her lips. ⏳

Only after he'd...
pressed his lips to her neck...

...did
she...

finally give in.

And they'd finally... 💋

shared their first kiss.

As they
kissed... 💋

he was unable to stop smiling.

For he could not remember... ⏳

when was the last time he'd
waited this long before kissing someone.

Not to mention
how...
the idea of their first kiss...

As it turned
out...
he checked another box:

Except one thing:

his mustache was getting in the way.

And it
came... ✨

so naturally — no less.

They kept on
kissing... 💋

And just like
that...

they became something.

Almost
official.

Eventually...
they called it a night. ⏳

And each went to
their own bed thinking:
Not bad for a second date!

Not bad at all.

Later that same
week... ⏳

he was getting impatient.
For he wanted to see her again.

So he asked if she'd be open to... 😢

seeing him — even for just a little bit.

Hoping she'd make it through her shift...

and want to see him just as much.

He wasted no
time...

and went by her place.

On that day she talked
about... 👯

how she and her sisters
took ballet classes

And how the three of them
also had...

taken a few martial arts classes together. 🥋

😝 Fun fact: 🤓

The instructor called her every name
except her own.

Later that
week...

their third date arrived.

Almost
deeper.

They'd already agreed...

she'd be the one this time...

They ended up at a cozy jazz bar
where he...

recognized one of the songs —

And little by little — they were

connecting more deeply.

As they talked and drank — she 👀

got that mischievous sparkle
in her eyes.

As if — he could

She said:

And it was in that moment...
he knew — he'd be
the one finding himself in...

Out came his hand —
again 💃

asking her for a dance.

Only this time was...

For

As the saying goes:

"Fortune favors the bold."

So they got up
and danced...
and they swayed their bodies in rhythm.
First...

And then...

As they
danced... 💎

he squeezed her up
against his chest.

That boost of confidence... 💪

was about to pay off.

Him spending his entire
day... 🏠

tidying up
and sorting misplaced objects...

...doing
the dishes...

...multitasking
and so on...

would not be for nothing.

"I'd better be prepared" — he thought. 🧠

His face lit up
at the idea of her coming over.

"Better safe than sorry!"

He was a firm believer in that.

He was so proud...

of what he'd done.

As the moment
arrived... 👀

he looked her in the eyes —
and channeled every last bit of...

...charm
he had in him.

And said:

Unlucky
for her...

Lucky
for him... 😊

the drinks they had were on her.
For he hadn't any money on him.

Later that night — she said: ⏳

Don't let fear stop you
from expressing what you think!

She kept going:

For in general...
I'm a go-with-the-flow type of person.

Hearing her
say that...

"Can it be?!" — he thought. 🧠

For in his
past...

he'd had his share of
genuinely traumatic experiences.

More often than
not...

he'd feel trapped —
unable to find a way out.

Anyway..
they arrived at his place.
She made herself at home on the couch and...

...he poured them sparkling wine
...
and as they raised their glasses — he said:

As they
settled in...

they started making out.

...and then things got
a little heated... 🛏️

which led them to the bedroom.

Almost
vulnerable.

As they got undressed —
he realized ⏳

she was the only girl whose
first time getting intimate with him felt so...

...natural and completely without shame. ✨

He admired that about her.

That night she'd put on a bit... 🌙

too much glitter — only for what they were...

about to do — glitter was a fire hazard.

And as the saying goes:
"where there's fire, there's...

...smoke."
Although theirs was a...

Pure bliss...
as their bodies came together.
Which FYI — not the kind of...

Round and round as they...

not standing still
for more than five seconds.

He wanted to...
eat her so badly. ⏳

For better
or worse...

that card was simply
not on the table that night.

Safe to
say...

some serious business went down.

But...
that's enough detail. 📖

For this is a story about falling in love.

And so this...

became their first of...

...hopefully many
other... 🌙

nights to follow.

The next morning...

and he...

His first thoughts?

In fact:
He hadn't felt this...

Unable to... 🛏️

go back to sleep...

he turned to her and said:

'Morning. Shall we get up?

To which — she replied: 🛏️

Why don't we stay
in bed a little longer and cuddle?

After enough
cuddling...

he went to the kitchen
to make them breakfast.

In the fridge there
were... 🍳

enough eggs to make an omelette
and oranges for juice.

But first...

Naturally...
he asked her:

To which...
her response was:

And then...

He could not... ✨

wrap his head around how...

Everything had
somehow...


so neatly into place.

Almost as if she were an...

Or rather.

Almost
a toast...

A little kindness, raised high.

And now...

to the cheering part.

Here's to you...
enjoying more...

as loud as you possibly can.

Here's to you...

...travelling
around...

Here's to you...
holding hands...

with whomever... 🤝

...and through
whatever...

life may throw your way.

Here's to you having...
or making...

supportive friends.

For my part...

Or at least...

Last but not least...
here's to you... 🌱

growing...

older.

Almost
the softer questions...

Slower now.

There might've
been moments... 💎

where you might've felt...

...a little
disconnected.

And your mind
went like:

You're getting
way ahead of yourself.

Which...

And you might've wanted...
to take things slower.

Which would be...

...totally
fine.

But if you'd asked me...

I'd say...

You worry
too much.

For ask
yourself...

this:

What is it...

that you're

What is your...

What is... 🌙

keeping you up at night?

For if you'd really...
thought about it... 🧠

perhaps you'd have...

realized
something...

we both want
the same thing.

What's that?
— you may ask.

I think it's our duty...

...to our wounded
and scared

inner child...

...to keep it
safe

from harm's way.

Almost
the ask...

Small words. Big meaning.

All I'd ever...
ask of you...

in return...

would be that you'd...

...on your
warmth... ✨

and on your...

affection...

which I'm certain you...
have plenty of.

Almost
a promise.

If
you ever...

would've

in
need of...

or
support...

of any kind —

of

I'd
be your

For
as long as...

we actively would've...

I would've even

I would've have made it...

my
personal...

to keep

met.

And
if still

You
would've...

been kept "well fed" at least.😏

Almost
done.

That's
all folks!

Stay

Ahem —
I mean...

Stay

Oh and —

one last thing.
